description: We are a government agency that helps to deliver economic confidence by supporting those in financial distress, tackling financial wrongdoing and maximising returns to creditors. The Insolvency Service is an executive agency, sponsored by the Department for Business and Trade .

details.body:
We are a government agency that helps to deliver economic confidence by supporting those in financial distress, tackling financial wrongdoing and maximising returns to creditors.

The Insolvency Service is an executive agency, sponsored by the Department for Business and Trade.

ordered_featured_documents.summary: This director information hub is a home for information and guidance to help current and future directors. It only takes a minute to learn the essentials.
ordered_featured_documents.title: Director information hub

ordered_featured_documents.summary: The Insolvency Service has announced that its new Chief Executive will be Duncan Beach
ordered_featured_documents.title: New Chief Executive of the Insolvency Service appointed

ordered_featured_documents.summary: Full guidance on what happens when you’re made bankrupt.
ordered_featured_documents.title: Guide to Bankruptcy

ordered_featured_documents.summary: Insolvency Service Redundancy Payments Service factsheet for employees made redundant by an insolvent employer
ordered_featured_documents.title: Factsheet: what to do when you’ve been made redundant

ordered_featured_documents.summary: Partnership aims to boost tip-offs about banned directors still operating in the shadows
ordered_featured_documents.title: Insolvency Service joins forces with Crimestoppers to crack down on rogue directors

ordered_featured_documents.summary: If you’re unsure about an email, letter, call or text you receive from the Insolvency Service, get in touch with us.
ordered_featured_documents.title: Insolvency Service related scams and fraud

details.secondary_corporate_information_pages: Read about the types of information we routinely publish in our Publication scheme. Our Personal information charter explains how we treat your personal information. Read our policy on Social media use.

details.body: The inspector general and chief executive has overall responsibility for the day-to-day management of the service, in line with plans agreed with ministers. As accounting officer, they are accountable to parliament for the service’s use of public money and stewardship of its assets.

role_appointments.title: Duncan Beach - Interim Chief Executive Officer

details.body: The Chief Operating Officer reports directly to the Chief Executive and is accountable for the overall operational performance of the insolvency service. This includes the work of official receivers, investigations and enforcement activity such as the disqualification of unfit directors, and statutory redundancy payments from the National Insurance Fund.

role_appointments.title: Alec Pybus - Interim Chief Operating Officer

details.body: The inspector general and chief executive has overall responsibility for the day-to-day management of the service, in line with plans agreed with ministers. As accounting officer, they are accountable to parliament for the service’s use of public money and stewardship of its assets.

role_appointments.title: Alec Pybus - Interim Chief Executive Officer

details.body: The Chief Operating Officer reports directly to the Chief Executive and is accountable for the overall operational performance of the insolvency service. This includes the work of official receivers, investigations and enforcement activity such as the disqualification of unfit directors, and statutory redundancy payments from the National Insurance Fund.

The Director of Finance, Commercial, Sustainability and Property is responsible for the agency’s financial management and reporting, including procurement and financial risk management. They also manage the agency’s estate and provide support to the board on financial management.

role.title: Director of Finance, Commercial, Sustainability and Property

role_appointments.title: Chantel Kelly - Director of Finance, Commercial, Sustainability and Property

details.body: The People and Communications Director is a member of the Insolvency Service Board and Executive Leadership Team, and reports directly to the Chief Executive. They are responsible for the agency’s HR and communications functions, including internal and external communications, stakeholder relations, and a full HR service including strategic workforce planning, learning and development, pay and benefits, employee and trade union relations, wellbeing and diversity and inclusion.

role_appointments.title: Melissa Quignon-Finch -  People and Communications Director, the Insolvency Service

details.body: Working as a job-share partnership, the Strategy, Policy & Analysis Directors are members of the Insolvency Service Board and Executive Leadership Team, and report directly to the Chief Executive. They are responsible for the agency’s policy function, which reports to Ministers in the Department for Business and Trade, the agency’s strategy function, its analysis team including the production of Official Statistics on insolvency, as well as oversight regulation for the insolvency profession.

role.title: Co-Director of Strategy, Policy and Analysis

role_appointments.title: Angela Crossley - Co-Director of Strategy, Policy and Analysis

details.body: Working as a job-share partnership, the Strategy, Policy & Analysis Directors are members of the Insolvency Service Board and Executive Leadership Team, and report directly to the Chief Executive. They are responsible for the agency’s policy function, which reports to Ministers in the Department for Business and Trade, the agency’s strategy function, its analysis team including the production of Official Statistics on insolvency, as well as oversight regulation for the insolvency profession.

role.title: Co-Director of Strategy, Policy and Analysis

role_appointments.title: Claire Hardgrave - Co-Director of Strategy, Policy and Analysis

details.body: The Legal Services Director is a member of the Insolvency Service Executive Leadership Team and reports directly to the Chief Operating Officer. They are responsible for the agency’s legal enforcement functions, including criminal prosecution and civil litigation functions

role_appointments.title: Jonathan Lupton - Director of Legal Services

details.body:
The Director of Investigation and Enforcement Services is part of the operations directorate reporting to the Chief Operating Officer.

They are responsible for the agencies civil, criminal and financial investigation teams along with key enabling functions such as Intelligence, Compliance and Targeting and Digital Forensics.

role.title: Director of Investigation and Enforcement Services.

role_appointments.title: Dave Magrath - Director of Investigation and Enforcement Services.

details.body:
The Official Receiver Services Director is a member of the Executive Leadership Team and reports to the Chief Operating Officer.

They are responsible for the operational leadership and the performance of our Official Receivers, who are investigating and administering the estates of individuals subject to bankruptcy and companies in compulsory liquidation.

role_appointments.title: Justin Dionne - Director of Official Receiver Services

role.title: Director of Economic Crime Reform Implementation

role_appointments.title: Matt Ray - Director of Economic Crime Reform Implementation

details.body: The Chief Operating Officer reports directly to the Chief Executive and is accountable for the overall operational performance of the insolvency service. This includes the work of official receivers, investigations and enforcement activity such as the disqualification of unfit directors, and statutory redundancy payments from the National Insurance Fund.

role_appointments.title: John Wheatle - Interim Chief Operating Officer

details.body: The Business Services Director is a member of the Executive Leadership Team and reports directly to the Chief Operating Officer. They are responsible for a range of operational functions that deliver high volume insolvency services to the public and other stakeholders. These include the distribution of National Insurance funds to redundant employees, provision of personal debt solutions to those in financial distress, our Customer Contact Centre, administration of funds flowing through insolvent estates, and distribution of Payment Protection Insurance related redress to creditors.

role_appointments.title: John Wheatle - Interim Director of Business Services Division

details.description:
Please only attend our offices if you have an appointment.

For information about the insolvency process contact the Insolvency Service helpline. The helpline is open 9am to 5pm Monday to Thursday, and 9am to 3pm on Friday. 

We can give you information about processes administered or regulated by the Insolvency Service. This includes bankruptcy, debt relief orders and company liquidations.

We cannot give you: legal or financial advice, information on specific insolvency cases, information or advice about other government departments or information about redundancy payments. 

If you are contacting about an existing bankruptcy or compulsory company liquidation case, use our ‘contact an official receiver’ guidance.
details.title: Insolvency Service helpline
Ask the Insolvency Service digital assistant

ordered_contacts.title: Ask the Insolvency Service digital assistant

details.description:
Contact about claims for redundancy, loss of notice pay, holiday pay, arrears of wages, protective award payments and lost pension contributions. 

The helpline is open Monday to Thursday 9am to 5pm, and Friday 9am to 3pm

Online Claims Service: https://www.gov.uk/claim-redundancy
details.title: Redundancy Payments

details.description:
The Insolvency Service Investigations and Enforcement Services
are responsible for investigating serious financial misconduct in companies and individuals who are subject to bankruptcy or debt relief orders. 

https://www.gov.uk/government/collections/insolvency-service-investigations-and-enforcement-what-we-do-our-outcomes-and-complaints

Our independent Legal Services Directorate  is the lead enforcement agency for insolvency related fraud and associated corporate misconduct.

https://www.gov.uk/government/groups/insolvency-service-legal-services-directorate
details.title: Investigations and Enforcement Services

details.description:
This service is for journalists only. For any other queries, please contact the Insolvency Enquiry Line.

For all media enquiries outside normal working hours, please contact the Department for Business and Trade Press Office on 0207 215 2000.
details.title: Press Office

details.description: This service is for money advisers who need advice about the breathing space service.
details.title: Breathing Space

details.body: The Deputy Chief Executive and Director of Operations has overall responsibility for the Insolvency Service’s front line operations. This includes the work of official receivers, investigations and enforcement activity such as the disqualification of unfit directors, and statutory redundancy payments from the National Insurance Fund.

ordered_roles.title: Deputy Chief Executive and Operations Director, the Insolvency Service

details.body: The People and Communications Director is a member of the Insolvency Service Board and Executive Leadership Team, and reports directly to the Chief Executive. They are responsible for the agency’s HR and communications functions, including internal and external communications, stakeholder relations, and a full HR service including strategic workforce planning, learning and development, pay and benefits, employee and trade union relations, wellbeing and diversity and inclusion.

The director is responsible for overseeing the:

  • policy section, which advises ministers on the legislative framework for insolvency
  • regulation of insolvency practitioners by recognised professional bodies
  • statistical team
  • external customer and communications functions for the service

ordered_roles.title: External Affairs Director, the Insolvency Service
